transcript:
CALLER: Hello, I want to know if you have a dedicated TPA helpdesk at the clinic.
AGENT: Yes, we do have a dedicated insurance and TPA helpdesk at Sunrise Multispeciality Clinic.
CALLER: And what are their working hours?
AGENT: The insurance desk is operational Monday to Saturday from 9 AM to 5 PM. For emergencies after hours, the admissions team can assist with basic insurance coordination.
CALLER: Can they help with pre-authorisation for a planned surgery?
AGENT: Absolutely. Our TPA team handles all pre-authorisation requests, including gathering documents, submitting them to your insurer, and following up. It's advisable to come in 2-3 days before your procedure.
CALLER: Very helpful. I'll come by Monday.
AGENT: We'll be happy to assist. See you Monday!
